# intrepidkarthi.com

> Personal website of Karthikeyan NG (Karthik) — engineer, author, speaker, and full-time trader on perpetual futures markets.

## About

Karthik is a builder-architect with 16+ years shipping software. Based between Bengaluru and Dubai. His work spans crypto infrastructure, AI/ML, trading systems, and product engineering.

Career highlights: CTO at Pi42 (crypto exchange), Director of Engineering at nference (healthcare AI on 2.5PB data), Head of Tech at Chumbak, founder of GazeMatic (420k+ downloads). Published two ML books with Packt in 2018. TEDx speaker (2017). 18+ hackathon wins.

## Current Projects

- [feaws.xyz](https://feaws.xyz): Quantitative trading lab for Bitcoin/crypto. 70% accuracy on 30 test windows. Public whitepaper + live trades. Stack: Python, Polymarket API, GDELT, sentiment analysis.
- [DailyVox](https://intrepidkarthi.com/writing/dailyvox-why-i-built-a-voice-journal-that-stays-on-your-phone/): Offline AI voice diary for iOS. 100% on-device, zero cloud, AES-256-GCM encryption.
- [VisionPay.com](https://visionpay.com): Stablecoin settlement infrastructure.
- [1wealth.ai](https://1wealth.ai): Crypto fintech infrastructure.

## Published Books

- [Mobile Artificial Intelligence Projects](https://intrepidkarthi.com/lab/) (Packt, 2018): TensorFlow Lite + Core ML, end-to-end mobile AI projects.
- [Machine Learning for Mobile Applications](https://intrepidkarthi.com/lab/) (Packt, 2018): Mental models and architecture decisions for mobile ML.

## Pages

- [Home](https://intrepidkarthi.com/): Bio and recent blog posts
- [About](https://intrepidkarthi.com/about/): Full professional background, career timeline, education
- [Mission](https://intrepidkarthi.com/mission/): 41 life goals across build, adventure, travel, learn, lead categories with progress tracking
- [Lab](https://intrepidkarthi.com/lab/): Active projects, books, and past work
- [Writing](https://intrepidkarthi.com/writing/): Blog archive — 98 posts since 2008
- [Contact](https://intrepidkarthi.com/contact/): Email, mentoring, advisory, social links

## Writing Topics

Karthik writes about crypto and stablecoins, trading systems, product building, AI/ML, hackathons, personal reflections, and tech tutorials. The blog archive spans from 2008 to present.
